Job Title: Senior Delivery Lead - Digital / Mobile / Agile
Ad Text:
About Us

Senior Delivery Lead - Digital / Mobile / Agile 

12m FTC

ASAP Start

Sydney Hybrid (Barangaroo)

Let’s create a more sociable future together. 

Endeavour Group is Australia’s leader in the drinks and hospitality industry. With more than 28,000 team members and a footprint of over 1,600 stores and 330 hotels, we’re behind household names such as Dan Murphy’s, BWS, and ALH Hotels. Our shared purpose? To create a more sociable future together.

About the Role

Position Purpose Statement

The Senior Delivery Lead role is central to the running of multiple squads to set them up for success in prioritising, planning and executing on transformation initiatives using Scrum or Kanban frameworks. They enable the squads through removing any impediments while facilitating transparency of all the work, progress of sprint goals and capacity to interested stakeholders as well as to the squads themselves.

The role is responsible for ensuring the squads adhere to agile methodologies and principles and involves organising and facilitating agile ceremonies such as daily scrums, backlog refinement, sprint planning and retrospectives. On occasion, they will also be expected to assist other Delivery Leads or squads in establishing best practice and agile ways of working wherever coaching is required.

This role will operate at an operational and strategic level to:

Deliver the roadmap using agile methodology in partnership with business stakeholders.

Partner with your product manager and our chapter leads to build and develop a cross functional squad.

Work closely with external teams to plan dependencies and releases of the product.

Deliver products to customers to improve their experience across digital channels they interact with.

Sound good? Read on.

Here is a taster of what you can expect in this role:

Key Responsibilities: What am I accountable to deliver?

Delivery Leadership

Responsible for application of the agile & scrum values and principles in day-to-day routine.

Responsible for ensuring full participation of all squad members in the delivery of value.

Play a lead in the planning and facilitation of tribal agile ceremonies of Showcase & Big Room Planning (BRP).

Responsible for the application and facilitation of the Continuous Improvement practices and team mindset.

Responsible for removing squads blockers with support from the Product Manager or management if needed to ensure planned sprints are delivered as expected.

Responsible for ensuring team norms are understood and followed.

Ensures continual improvement practices are applied and agreed actions are implemented.

Mentor and Coach the team to be empowered and instill a proactive, positive and innovative team culture.

Work closely with Product Managers on prioritization of the squad backlog to maximize value delivered.

Responsible for ongoing health of the squad, ensuring that it is set up to deliver end-to-end outcomes, providing coaching & feedback, ensuring resources are planned effectively and are fully utilized.

Ensures that the squads have engaged with business stakeholders (internal customers) insights and feedback during the delivery of their work.

A clear link between insights and action development should be visible.

Works with other product managers to ensure that their squads backlog is prioritized appropriately to meet cross-team dependencies.

Works closely with the squads to remove impediments and "roadblocks" for the squad.

Decides whether the work the squads have delivered is ready for release, works with the squads to define criteria for work to be released and is accountable for the quality of the squad's released work.

Where necessary, support vendor selections as part of the decision to build or buy product solutions.

What do we need from you

Now let’s talk about you:

Knowledge and Experiential Requirements

Knowledge, understanding and experience of working with Data and/or AI squads.

Extensive Experience working with commercial partners in a complex, matrix organization.

Extensive Experience working in an agile organization or with cross functional teams.

Demonstrated ability to build collaborative relationships with a diverse range of stakeholders.

Develops teams that set and deliver to high standards, drive innovation and create value autonomously, while living our culture and values.

Strong ability to prioritize, balancing delivery in the short-term while supporting the overall strategy.

Extensive Experience in managing complex dependencies and releases.

Solid understanding of Agile and Scrum methodology, disciplines and procedures, and ability, to help / guide others on the processes.

Extensive Experience in Agile delivery managing product backlogs, prioritizing requests, writing user stories, sprint planning, iterations, retros, stand-ups.

Eye for detail, and ability to quickly understand requirements and help the team articulate correctly to form the basis for the sprint planning with focus on delivering a quality outcome.

Extensive Experience working and using Agile tools (Jira, Confluence, DevOps).

Strong collaboration with cross functional teams across Endeavour.

A degree of flexibility will be required in this role as we build and maintain the roadmap.

What's in it for you?

The benefits are good too! 


An exclusive discount card for BWS, Dan Murphy’s, Woolworths, BIG W and other Endeavour Group brands, including our ALH pubs
Your health and wellbeing is your most important asset, and as one of our valued team members, it’s our first priority. You will have a range of free services to help you live well and support your physical, mental and financial wellbeing
Endeavour Group is full of opportunities - use our dedicated learning and development options to grow an idea, yourself, and your career. This is just the start, so dream big.
At Endeavour, we value being a workplace where everyone’s welcome - if you meet a number of the requirements (and not all), we encourage you to apply.
_______________________________
Additional Info:

We are together creators

With a portfolio that includes Dan Murphy’s, BWS, ALH Hotels, Pinnacle Drinks and more, Endeavour Group is big on sociability. Together we create the moments that bring millions of people together. And together we have more fun, create more opportunities, and score a lot more goals. We’re serious about creating a safe, inclusive and fun place to rock up to where equal opportunity is key, and flexibility is part of how we roll.  

We’re all about creating a more sociable future - for our customers and each other. If this job excites you - and you’re close-enough on the requirements, reach out, we’d love to hear from you.

You can learn more about working with us on LinkedIn or at endeavourgroupcareers.com.au.

Our Talent Team and Hiring Leaders kindly request no unsolicited resumes or approaches from Recruitment Agencies. Endeavour Group is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.

#WeAreTogetherCreators #ComeAsYouAre #DreamBig #FeelTheEnergy #LeaveYourMark #EndeavourGroup

Future Secure AI (FSAI) is a fast‑growing enterprise AI company built in deep partnership with one of the world’s largest financial institutions. We work directly with C‑suite leaders across global enterprises to deliver AI solutions that transform how organisations operate.

We’re expanding rapidly and are now looking for a Senior Technical Business Analyst to join our Sydney team and help shape several high‑impact AI initiatives already underway.

Why join us

·       Work on real enterprise AI projects with global reach

·       Collaborate with senior leaders and world‑class technical teams

·       Hybrid work environment based in Sydney CBD

·       Opportunity to influence product direction and delivery

·       Exposure to cutting‑edge AI use cases across multiple industries

The Role

As our Senior Technical Business Analyst, you’ll lead analysis and delivery across a portfolio of complex AI and technology projects. You’ll work closely with product, engineering, and enterprise stakeholders to translate strategy into clear requirements and ensure successful execution.

You will:

·       Facilitate workshops, gather requirements, and define user stories for large‑scale enterprise initiatives

·       Analyse data, processes, and workflows to support decision‑making and risk management

·       Partner with senior leaders to shape delivery strategies and prioritise initiatives

·       Support agile teams by clarifying requirements, removing blockers, and enabling fast decision‑making

·       Build a deep understanding of our AI products and contribute to continuous improvement

·       Work across multiple use cases, including emerging AI capabilities and new product features

About You

·       You’re a confident, proactive Senior BA who thrives in complex environments and enjoys working at the intersection of business, technology, and innovation.

You bring:

·       8+ years as a Business Analyst, ideally in enterprise or consulting environments

·       Strong experience leading complex technology or AI‑related projects

·       Excellent facilitation skills and experience running inception and requirements workshops

·       Solid understanding of software development processes, compliance, and regulatory considerations

·       Ability to work in fast‑paced, agile environments

·       Strong communication skills and the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels

·       Experience with automation and UI/UX highly valuable

·       Exposure to AI or machine learning projects (preferred but not essential)

What success looks like

·       You quickly build trust with senior stakeholders

·       You bring clarity to complex problems and drive outcomes

·       You help shape the direction of new AI initiatives

·       You contribute to a culture of high performance and collaboration

Ready to make an impact?

If you’re excited about working with cutting‑edge AI, partnering with global leaders, and joining a high‑growth company, we’d love to hear from you.

For a quicker response, we encourage you to apply directly through our website at https://www.futuresecure.ai/. There, you can meet our Digital Co-worker and experience our product first hand.

Job Title: Senior Business Analyst – Procurement | Defence ERP.
Ad Text:
Senior Business Analyst – Procurement | Defence ERP | SAP S/4HANA

Blooming People is excited to be the exclusive recruitment partner for a boutique consultancy that is building strong momentum in Defence and is now expanding its team.

Join a critical Defence ERP program supporting the CASG Commercial Division in Melbourne.

This is a high-impact opportunity for a senior procurement-focused Business Analyst who understands how complex procurement environments actually work. You’ll play a key role across the Procure-to-Pay (P2P) value chain, helping shape business processes, improve compliance, support ERP adoption, and strengthen the way procurement operates within a highly governed Defence environment.

Why this role stands out

Work on a major Defence ERP program with visible organisational impact

Use your SAP S/4HANA and procurement expertise in a role that goes beyond documentation

Influence process, policy, training, and stakeholder adoption across the P2P lifecycle

Partner with Defence and industry stakeholders on complex procurement outcomes

Melbourne-based full-time role with Baseline clearance required and the ability to gain NV1

About the role

You’ll support the Commercial function across end-to-end procurement activities within the wider Defence ERP environment. This is not a passive note-taking BA role. You’ll be expected to bring sound judgement, work with a high level of autonomy, and help translate complex procurement requirements into practical, compliant, workable processes.

What you’ll be doing

Map, analyse and improve procurement business processes across the P2P value chain

Support SAP S/4HANA-aligned process design, documentation and business readiness

Ensure workflows and documentation remain aligned to Defence procurement policy and frameworks

Work closely with Defence stakeholders to support consistency, adoption and procurement outcomes

Help identify where policy, training, templates and process guidance need to be updated

Contribute to the knowledge base, templates and supporting artefacts used within the new ERP environment

What you’ll bring

To succeed in this role, you’ll bring a strong mix of procurement domain knowledge, SAP capability, and stakeholder credibility.

You will likely have:

Hands-on transactional experience with SAP S/4HANA and confidence navigating SAP ERP environments

A background in commercial or procurement roles, ideally in Defence or the public sector

Strong understanding of Commonwealth procurement and the Procure-to-Pay (P2P) value chain

Experience working within complex, highly governed procurement environments

The ability to engage confidently with stakeholders at multiple levels

A proactive, self-directed approach and the judgement to operate effectively with minimal supervision

Why high-calibre candidates apply

Top candidates are usually drawn to roles where they can do meaningful work, influence how things operate, and build credibility on major programs. This role offers all three. You’ll be joining a complex transformation environment where your procurement expertise, SAP knowledge, and ability to navigate policy-driven decision-making will be genuinely valued.

Location & clearance

Location: Melbourne

Role type: Full-time

Clearance: Baseline required, with ability to gain NV1

Apply now

This role will suit a senior analyst who understands procurement in practice, can work comfortably in structured environments, and wants to contribute to a significant Defence program rather than just support it from the sidelines.
